session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: How do we configure Kafka producer acks for financial workloads?

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: Set acks=all and enable.idempotence=true for durable exactly-once producer semantics in financial Kafka pipelines.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: What Schema Registry subject naming strategies should we use for Confluent?

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: TopicNameStrategy is the default; RecordNameStrategy enables schema reuse across Confluent topics.

session_3.speaker: Alice
session_3.text: Which compression codec should we use for our Confluent Kafka topics?

session_3.speaker: Bob
session_3.text: Use lz4 for throughput-optimized Kafka producers and zstd for storage-constrained Confluent clusters.

qa.question: What acks value ensures exactly-once producer semantics?
What Kafka producer acks configuration for financial workloads was discussed?
Which compression codec is recommended for storage-constrained Confluent clusters?
What is the lz4 versus zstd throughput tradeoff?
